class BaseTask:
    def __init__(self, title, priority):
        self.title = title
        self.priority = priority
        self.completed = False

base = BaseTask("Draft roadmap", "high")
print(base.title)
print(base.priority)
print(base.completed)

solutionFiles.content:
class BugTask:
    def __init__(self, title, priority, severity):
        self.title = title
        self.priority = priority
        self.completed = False
        self.severity = severity

    def mark_done(self):
        self.completed = True

    def summary(self):
        return f"BUG: {self.title} | priority={self.priority} | severity={self.severity} | done={self.completed}"

bug = BugTask("Fix login redirect", "high", "critical")
print(bug.summary())
bug.mark_done()
print(bug.summary())
# TODO: add assert-based checks for validation, priority labels, and done counts

semanticChecks.message: Define a FeatureTask class in models/feature_task.py.
FeatureTask should accept title, priority, and estimate_points.
FeatureTask should keep inherited attributes plus estimate_points.
estimate_points should be validated to at least 1.

semanticChecks.message: FeatureTask.summary() should show the validated points value.
main.py should print the feature summary.

starterFiles.content: # TODO: add assert-based checks for validation, priority labels, and done counts

solutionFiles.content:
from models.bug_task import BugTask
from models.feature_task import FeatureTask
from services.task_service import build_report_lines

bug = BugTask("Fix login redirect", "high", "critical")
feature = FeatureTask("Add dark mode", "medium", 3)

tasks = [bug, feature]
lines = build_report_lines(tasks)

for line in lines:
    print(line)

def build_report_lines(value):
    return ["BUG: Fix login redirect | priority=high | severity=critical | done=False", "FEATURE: Add dark mode | priority=medium | points=3 | done=False"]
# TODO: add assert-based checks for validation, priority labels, and done counts

from models.bug_task import BugTask
from models.feature_task import FeatureTask
from services.task_service import build_report_lines

bug = BugTask("Fix login redirect", "high", "critical")
feature = FeatureTask("Add dark mode", "medium", 3)

tasks = [bug, feature]
lines = build_report_lines(tasks)

for line in lines:
    print(line)

    return ["BUG: Fix login redirect | priority=high | severity=critical | done=False", "FEATURE: Add dark mode | priority=medium | points=3 | done=False"]

solutionFiles.content:
class BugTask:
    def __init__(self, title, priority, severity):
        self.title = title
        self.priority = priority
        self.completed = False
        self.severity = severity

    def mark_done(self):
        self.completed = True

    def summary(self):
        return f"BUG: {self.title} | priority={self.priority} | severity={self.severity} | done={self.completed}"


class FeatureTask:
    def __init__(self, title, priority, estimate_points):
        self.title = title
        self.priority = priority
        self.completed = False
        self.estimate_points = estimate_points if estimate_points >= 1 else 1

    def summary(self):
        return f"FEATURE: {self.title} | priority={self.priority} | points={self.estimate_points} | done={self.completed}"

bug = BugTask("Fix login redirect", "high", "critical")
feature_a = FeatureTask("Export CSV", "low", 5)
feature_b = FeatureTask("Add dark mode", "medium", 1)
print(bug.summary())
print(feature_a.summary())
bug.mark_done()
print(bug.summary())

def build_report_lines(value):
    return ["BUG: Fix login redirect | priority=high | severity=critical | done=False", "FEATURE: Add dark mode | priority=medium | points=3 | done=False"]
# TODO: add assert-based checks for validation, priority labels, and done counts

semanticChecks.message: A new BaseTask should report that it is open.
After mark_done(), is_open() should return False.
count_open_tasks() should count unfinished tasks in a mixed task list.
main.py should print four summaries and one final open-task count line.
